tests.prompt: Repurpose this blog excerpt for Twitter and Facebook: 'The Lip Renew Recovery Stick uses Ahiflower Oil for Omega-3 tissue repair, Manuka Honey for antibacterial protection, and Caffeine to reduce swelling. All wax-free.'
assertions: Twitter output is under 280 characters OR formatted as a thread
Output does NOT contain em dashes
Output mentions at least one specific ingredient
Output includes 'Available on Amazon Prime' or similar CTA
Output adapts tone for each platform (not copy-paste)
